description: Timeline of landmark events in India-EU bilateral relations leading to and following the 2026 agreements.

agreements.name: India-EU Free Trade Agreement (FTA)
key_provisions: Elimination of tariffs on 8,500+ product lines
Phased tariff reduction on 3,200 additional items over 3-10 years
Mutual recognition of product standards and certifications
Digital trade chapter with data flow provisions
Sustainable development chapter with labor and environmental standards

agreements.name: Mobility & Migration Pact
agreements.formal_title: India-EU Mobility and Migration Partnership Agreement
key_provisions: Cascade visa regime for Indian nationals (1-year, 2-year, 5-year)
EU Blue Card facilitation for Indian skilled workers
Youth mobility scheme for professionals under 35
Mutual social security coordination
Readmission cooperation framework

agreements.name: Security & Strategic Partnership
agreements.formal_title: India-EU Security and Defense Partnership Framework
key_provisions: Joint naval exercises in Indian Ocean Region
Cybersecurity cooperation and information sharing
Counter-terrorism intelligence framework
Critical technology co-development in AI, quantum, and semiconductors
Space cooperation under Gaganyaan-ESA collaboration

agreements.name: Green Alliance
agreements.formal_title: India-EU Clean Energy and Climate Partnership
key_provisions: €10 billion green investment corridor
Joint solar manufacturing initiatives
Green hydrogen pilot projects
Carbon credit mutual recognition
Joint climate adaptation fund for developing nations

timeline.event: India-EU FTA negotiations officially launched at the India-EU Summit in Helsinki.
Negotiations suspended due to disagreements on tariff levels and data exclusivity in pharmaceuticals.
EU-India Leaders' Meeting: Both sides agree to resume negotiations with a broader scope.
EU-India Trade and Technology Council (TTC) established to deepen strategic cooperation.
Third round of resumed FTA negotiations in New Delhi covers goods, services, and investment.
Chief negotiators report 'substantial progress' on 15 of 23 FTA chapters.
India and EU agree on the 'Cascade Regime' framework for visa facilitation of Indian nationals.
12th round of negotiations in Brussels achieves breakthrough on automotive tariff phase-out schedule.
16th and final negotiation round concludes in Brussels, covering all 23 FTA chapters and the visa cascade mechanism.
Historic signing ceremony in New Delhi. India and EU formally sign bilateral agreements covering trade, mobility, and security.
European Parliament votes 412-89 in favor of the India-EU FTA framework, clearing the way for national ratifications.
Cascade visa regime goes into effect. Indian nationals can now apply under the new tier system.
